title: schema-extractor manifest
description: Build manifest consumed by `schema-extractor gen` and the check integration test. Each target maps one or more JSONL inputs to a single generated .d.ts.

$schema.description: Optional path to this JSON Schema for editor tooling.

name.description: Stable identifier used for logging and test naming.

input.description: JSONL glob(s). Supports ~ expansion and ** patterns; relative paths resolve against the manifest directory.

output.description: Path the generated .d.ts is written to. Relative paths resolve against the manifest directory.

options.description: Per-target ExtractorOptions overrides. CLI flags still take precedence.

plugins.description: Names of bundled NamePlugins to enable for this target. Omitting this field means NO plugins are loaded — each target must opt in explicitly. Use ["vscode"] for the bundled VSCode plugin.

parameters.description: Numeric overrides for pipeline thresholds. Keys are validated against the known parameter set; values must be non-negative integers. CLI --param overrides take precedence.
